statement.headerDoc:
STEP 955 — Mathematical Physics Open Problems
  藤本伸樹 2026-04-21

  Five open problems at the math-physics interface:

  A. YANG-MILLS EXISTENCE AND MASS GAP (Millennium Prize)
     Prove existence of Yang-Mills quantum field theory in 4D and
     that it has a positive mass gap Δ > 0.
     STATUS: OPEN. One of the hardest open problems.

  B. QUANTUM CHAOS AND BERRY-TABOR CONJECTURE
     Integrable systems → Poisson level spacing; Chaotic → GUE/GOE.
     Berry-Tabor conjecture (1977): proved for arithmetic surfaces (Marklof 2003).

  C. QUANTUM ERGODICITY (Shnirelman-Zelditch-Colin de Verdière
